summary: Fixed 3 pagination issues: changed ::after positioning to top: 100%, fixed circular shape size change on hover using transparent border technique, and fixed arrow visibility by swapping background-image layer order
userRevisions: Change ::after positioning from bottom: 0 to top: 100% for proper placement below elements
Fix circular shape size change on hover by using transparent border instead of outline
Fix arrow icons not showing by swapping background-image layer order (SVG on top, gradient behind)

changes.description: Bottom bar now positioned immediately below element instead of at bottom edge inside it
Transparent border always present to prevent layout shift on hover
Changed from outline with -1px offset to border color change, maintaining circle size
Bottom bar positioned immediately below prev/next buttons

changes: Swapped layer order: SVG first, gradient second
Adjusted arrow path coordinates for larger viewBox
Swapped layer order: SVG first, gradient second
Adjusted arrow path coordinates for larger viewBox

issue1_afterPositioning.problem: ::after using bottom: 0 positioned bar at bottom edge inside element
issue1_afterPositioning.solution: Changed to top: 100% to position bar immediately below element (outside bounds)

issue2_circularShapeSizeChange.problem: Outline with -1px offset drew circle inward, making it visually shrink on hover
issue2_circularShapeSizeChange.solution: Use border: 1px solid transparent by default, then border-color: charcoal on hover. Since border is always present, no layout shift occurs and circle size stays constant
issue2_circularShapeSizeChange.technicalDetails: Transparent border reserves space in box model without being visible. On hover, only color changes, not dimensions.

issue3_arrowsNotShowing.problem: Gradient with background-size: cover was first layer (on top), completely hiding SVG arrow underneath
issue3_arrowsNotShowing.solution: Swapped layer order: SVG url() first (top layer), gradient second (bottom layer). Also increased arrow from 8px to 12px for better visibility
issue3_arrowsNotShowing.layerOrder: In CSS background-image, first layer paints on top. Need SVG on top to be visible.

afterPositioning.before: bottom: 0 (positions at bottom edge inside element bounds)
afterPositioning.after: top: 100% (positions at top edge of space below element, immediately after element)
afterPositioning.effect: Bar is now truly below the element rather than at its bottom edge

transparentBorderTechnique.benefit: No layout shift because border space is always reserved in box model
transparentBorderTechnique.comparison: Outline with -1px offset drew inside, shrinking visible circle by 2px total (1px each side)

backgroundImageLayering.previousSize: cover, 8px 8px (gradient covers all, SVG 8px but hidden)
backgroundImageLayering.fixedSize: 12px 12px, cover (SVG 12px visible on top, gradient fills behind)

verification.accessibility: maintained (ARIA attributes, keyboard support, screen reader announcements)
verification.visualIntegrity: bottom bars positioned correctly below elements, circles maintain constant size on hover, arrows visible
